title: Reconstitution of Reinsurance Advisory Committee
full_text:
# [Attachment: पुनर्बीमा सलाहकार समिति का पुनर्गठन _ Reconstitution of Reinsurance Advisory Committee.pdf] # **Notification** Ref: IRDAI/REIN/NOT/RIN/101/5/2022 Date: 19-05-2022 ## **Re: Reconstitution of Reinsurance Advisory Committee** As per provisions under Section 101B of the Insurance Act, 1938; the Authority hereby reconstitutes the Reinsurance Advisory Committee (RAC) with the Chairman and Members as mentioned below: |**S.N.**|**Name**|**Designation & Organisation**|**Position in RAC**| |---|---|---|---| |1|Shri Dhananjay Date|Former Managing Director, Swiss Re, India|Chairman| |2|Shri R. Chandrasekaran|Former Head of Reinsurance, Cholamandalam
MS General|Member| |3|Shri G. Srinivasan|Director, National Insurance Academy|Member| |4|Shri Parijat Dutta|Former General Manager, GIC Re, India|Member| The DGM (Re-insurance) will function as Secretary to the Reinsurance Advisory Committee. The committee is constituted with immediate effect and the tenure of the committee shall be for a period of three years from the date of publication in the IRDAI website. This has approval of the Competent Authority. SHYAMA Digitally signed by SHYAMA PRASAD PRASAD CHAKRABORTY Date: 2022.05.19 17:48:46 CHAKRABORTY +05'30' S P Chakraborty Chief General Manager (Reinsurance) सर्वे नं.-115/1, फाइनंशियल शिस्ट्रिक्ट नानकरामगुिा , गच्चीबाउली हैदराबाद - 500032 दूरभाष: +91-40-20204000 Survey No. 115/1, Financial District Nanakramguda, Gachibowli, Hyderabad – 500032 Tel: +91-40-20204000 # [Attachment: attachment-2] # **Notification** Ref: IRDAI/REIN/NOT/RIN/101/5/2022 Date: 19-05-2022 ## **Re: Reconstitution of Reinsurance Advisory Committee** As per provisions under Section 101B of the Insurance Act, 1938; the Authority hereby reconstitutes the Reinsurance Advisory Committee (RAC) with the Chairman and Members as mentioned below: |**S.N.**|**Name**|**Designation & Organisation**|**Position in RAC**| |---|---|---|---| |1|Shri Dhananjay Date|Former Managing Director, Swiss Re, India|Chairman| |2|Shri R. Chandrasekaran|Former Head of Reinsurance, Cholamandalam
MS General|Member| |3|Shri G. Srinivasan|Director, National Insurance Academy|Member| |4|Shri Parijat Dutta|Former General Manager, GIC Re, India|Member| The DGM (Re-insurance) will function as Secretary to the Reinsurance Advisory Committee. The committee is constituted with immediate effect and the tenure of the committee shall be for a period of three years from the date of publication in the IRDAI website. This has approval of the Competent Authority. SHYAMA Digitally signed by SHYAMA PRASAD PRASAD CHAKRABORTY Date: 2022.05.19 17:48:46 CHAKRABORTY +05'30' S P Chakraborty Chief General Manager (Reinsurance) सर्वे नं.-115/1, फाइनंशियल शिस्ट्रिक्ट नानकरामगुिा , गच्चीबाउली हैदराबाद - 500032 दूरभाष: +91-40-20204000 Survey No. 115/1, Financial District Nanakramguda, Gachibowli, Hyderabad – 500032 Tel: +91-40-20204000
